message:
chore: add storage/ directory to .gitignore

CHANGE SUMMARY
==============

Added the storage/ directory to .gitignore to prevent runtime data from being
committed to version control.

RATIONALE
=========

The storage/ directory contains per-project runtime data that is generated
during server operation and should never be committed to the repository:

1. **Project Archives**: Each project gets a dedicated git repository under
   storage/{project-slug}/ containing:
   - Agent profiles (agents/{name}/profile.json)
   - Message mailboxes (agents/{name}/inbox/, agents/{name}/outbox/)
   - Canonical messages (messages/YYYY/MM/*.md)
   - Path claims (claims/{hash}.json)
   - Image attachments (attachments/{hash[:2]}/{hash}.webp)

2. **SQLite Database**: The storage.sqlite3 file (if using default config) is
   already covered by existing .gitignore patterns (*.sqlite3), but the
   storage/ directory may contain additional runtime state.

3. **Per-Instance Data**: Each deployment/instance should maintain its own
   storage directory. This data is:
   - Environment-specific
   - Potentially large (with many messages/attachments)
   - Machine-local (not portable between deployments)
   - Already tracked in per-project git repositories within storage/

WHAT'S EXCLUDED
===============

With this change, the following will be ignored:
• storage/{project-slug}/.git/ - Per-project git repositories
• storage/{project-slug}/agents/ - Agent profiles and mailboxes
• storage/{project-slug}/messages/ - Message archives
• storage/{project-slug}/claims/ - File claim records
• storage/{project-slug}/attachments/ - WebP image attachments
• storage/{project-slug}/.archive.lock - File locks
• Any database files at storage/ root level

WHAT REMAINS TRACKED
=====================

All source code, tests, documentation, and configuration remain in git:
✓ src/mcp_agent_mail/ - Application code
✓ tests/ - Test suite
✓ pyproject.toml - Dependencies and build config
✓ README.md, AGENTS.md, TODO.md - Documentation
✓ third_party_docs/ - Reference materials

CONFIGURATION
=============

The storage directory location is configurable via .env:

STORAGE_ROOT=./storage  # Default location (now gitignored)

For development/testing, you can:
1. Use the default ./storage (gitignored)
2. Set STORAGE_ROOT to a different location
3. Use an absolute path for system-wide storage

TESTING IMPACT
==============

Tests should either:
1. Use temporary directories (pytest tmpdir fixtures)
2. Configure STORAGE_ROOT to a test-specific location
3. Clean up after themselves

The conftest.py already handles test isolation, so this change doesn't affect
the test suite.

DEPLOYMENT NOTES
================

When deploying mcp-agent-mail:

1. **Storage is Ephemeral**: If using container orchestration (Docker, K8s),
   consider whether storage/ should be:
   - Mounted as a persistent volume (for data persistence)
   - Kept ephemeral (for stateless deployments with external DB)

2. **Backup Strategy**: If using the default file-based storage:
   - Back up storage/ separately from code repository
   - Consider using git bundles for per-project archives
   - Database backups should follow standard SQLite procedures

3. **Multi-Instance**: For horizontal scaling:
   - Use PostgreSQL instead of SQLite (asyncpg dependency installed)
   - Mount storage/ on shared filesystem (NFS, EFS, etc.)
   - Or use external blob storage for attachments

MIGRATION GUIDE
===============

If you accidentally committed storage/ files before this change:

# Remove storage/ from git history (careful!)
git rm -r --cached storage/
git commit -m "chore: remove storage/ from version control"

# The storage/ directory will remain on disk but be untracked

FILES MODIFIED
==============

• .gitignore: Added "storage/" to "Project specific" section

This ensures clean git status and prevents accidental commits of runtime data.

🚀 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
